positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement featuring abstract celestial bodies—crescents, nebulas, and geometric star clusters—emerging from a pair of stylized, mythological phoenix wings. The composition should use clean, crisp silhouettes and strong cosmic contrasts against a midnight indigo background. Emphasize glowing neon accents (cyan, magenta, gold) for depth and energy. Style should be modern, vibrant, cosmic gothic, suitable for a clean, high-contrast print on fabric. Central composition, symmetrical, high detail, vector-art quality.
